title: Create: Clipboard Search
description: Simple client-side mod adding filtering and searching to the Material Checklist for Schematicannon.
body:
# Create: Clipboard Search

This is a small client-only mod that adds the following features to the Clipboard Resource Checklist in Create 6+

- Filtered Search
- Sort
  - Alphabetical Ascending
  - Alphabetical Descending
  - Item Count Descending

The Search bar is "hidden" at the top of the clipboard for a more seamless experience. Click the bottom of the silver clip on the clipboard to reveal the text input.
